fomod.Name: Marth Requiem Overhaul
fomod.Author: Marth
fomod.Description:
A terminal load-order mod that rebalances Requiem toward Final Fantasy VII-IX style elemental mechanics, difficulty, and late-game power scaling.
Core features: - Elemental resistance cap removed; absorb tier above 100% - Armor rating uncapped with diminishing returns - Late-game power scaling (levels 30-86+) - Boss readiness tracker via MCM (SkyUI required) - Vendor gold doubled, potion weight reduced - Compatible with Experience mod and Dragon Priests Weaken Alduin
